summary: Iteration 3 (PayPal live sandbox, Tickets, Notifications, Import Services) tested end-to-end. All 45 backend tests pass (18 new + 27 regression). Full UI flows validated: NotificationBell renders with unread badge, Support ticket create/reply works for user, admin listing + reply + status transitions verified in UI, PayPal tab/button present on AddFunds. No blocking issues found.

issues: Toast 'Welcome back, Demo User' briefly overlaps the NotificationBell button in the top-right (z-index overlap). Not blocking — toast disappears in ~3s and bell becomes clickable. Consider giving the toast a bottom-right position or lower z-index than the header.

critical_code_review_comments: tickets_router._notify helper cleanly dedupes across user/admin paths — good.
paypal_status endpoint correctly distinguishes 404 (unknown id) from 200 with 'CREATED' state for just-initiated orders — matches review spec.
import_supplier_services for sup_mock_default returns {imported:0, skipped>=1, note:...} with no DB side-effects — verified.
orders_router notifies via notifications collection on create and status change; NotificationBell polls every 30s on frontend — good.
Minor: login redirect destination differs for admin (/admin) vs user (/dashboard); login() helper in automation had to accept both — document in test_credentials.md.
Minor UX: welcome toast overlaps the bell icon (z-index). Non-blocking.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (updated test_paypal_placeholder -> test_paypal_live_checkout to reflect live sandbox)
seed_data_creation: Test created tickets (subject 'UI TEST ticket', 'UI TEST ticket v2', 'TEST_Ticket subject') via both API and UI. Small amount of notifications generated. One real order placed (100 qty, cheapest service) per notification test. Demo balance moved from ~$46.13 to ~$46.09.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PayPal sandbox works live (checkout creates real sandbox order, status returns CREATED with 0 amount_total before approval). Tickets flow covers both notification legs (admin->user on admin reply/status change; user->admins on create/user reply). Notifications collection is user-scoped — mark-all-read works. Admin import-services only scans mock supplier for now; the 'note' field explains pre-seeded skip. No open bugs. Backend: test_iteration3.py is the definitive regression for iteration 3 features.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. Only a cosmetic overlap between the success toast and the notification bell in the dashboard header (layout z-index), non-blocking.
